title: Robonet prompt to quant execution on Hyperliquid
summary_title: 488% backtest returns: How AI agents execute trading strategies on Hyperliquid
summary_description: Mike deployed an AI-built SMA crossover strategy on Hyperliquid using Robonet. Five dollars in credits, 488% backtest, now live as a vault.

key_moments.label: Space kicks off with Zerk and Wreck Gang validator intro
Augustus introduces Robonet's ecosystem focus and seven-year crypto background
Mike explains Elora's predictive AI: 52-53% directional accuracy baseline
Robonet problem: fragmented trading infrastructure requiring multiple skill sets
Mike's concrete example: 488% backtest from SMA crossover strategy deployed live
Security deep dive: Brevi key management, code immutability, emergency stop controls
Roadmap: Multi-asset, funding rate arbitrage, compliance-first vault products
AI agents racing to zero: arbitrage disappears as barrier to entry collapses

pull_quote: 52 percent is already enough, because 80 percent of traders actually make no money, so you've already beaten that by a big margin.
